summary: The documentation build failed due to a SyntaxError raised while converting ../transformers/docs/source/en/model_doc/llama.md to MDX; the job is configured to fail on warnings as well.
root_cause: A SyntaxError occurred during conversion of ../transformers/docs/source/en/model_doc/llama.md to the MDX format (raised in resolve_autodoc), causing the docs build to fail.

evidence.reason: Shows a parsing error occurred during the conversion process.

evidence.quote: SyntaxError: There was an error when converting ../transformers/docs/source/en/model_doc/llama.md to the MDX format.
evidence.reason: Explicitly identifies the file that failed to convert to MDX due to a SyntaxError.
Indicates the error was raised during the autodoc resolution step that converts content to MDX.

evidence.quote: Doc build failed because warnings were emitted (fail_on_warning=true).
evidence.reason: Shows the documentation build treats warnings as errors, which will cause failure if warnings exist alongside the SyntaxError.
The CI checks explicitly grep for this warning text, suggesting warnings of this form may be present and treated as errors.
Confirms the job terminated with a non-zero exit code due to the failure.

suggested_fix: Open ../transformers/docs/source/en/model_doc/llama.md and fix the invalid syntax that causes the SyntaxError (e.g., malformed Python code block or MDX markup). Re-run the documentation build locally to reproduce the error. Also inspect the docs build log for 'Bare assert found in runnable:' warnings (the job uses fail_on_warning=true) and resolve those warnings so the build does not fail on them.
